title: HMCTS management information - March 2025
body: "These documents provide the latest management information on workload and timeliness for the period from March 2024 to March 2025 for our civil and family courts, and tribunals.  There is an additional release which contains information about Crown Court Sitting days by financial year from April 2015 to March 2025.               HMCTS management information (accessible version) - March 2024 to March 2025    CSV, 7.16 KB  View online                   HMCTS management information - March 2024 to March 2025    ODS, 25.8 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format  This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email hmctsforms@justice.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.                   Crown Court Sitting days by financial year from April 2015 to March 2025    ODS, 10.9 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format  This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email hmctsforms@justice.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.     "
